creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
On Tue, Dec 02, 2008 at 04:10:04AM +0000, Jason Chambers wrote:
> Should we open a new PR and link it to this one?  Some recommend that
> course of action when a PR appears abandoned.

I'd prefer we not do that as it just creates more work for the bugbusting
team.

Unfortunately I don't personally have the resources to work on this
problem.

mcl
